items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding 'Approval deadlines and escalation'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to these aspects. The linked use case outlines a multi-party sign-off workflow but lacks concrete evidence or mechanisms that demonstrate how approval deadlines and escalation are implemented or enforced, leading to an inconclusive status.
